build.buildCommand: if [ -d backend ]; then cd backend; fi; ./mvnw -DskipTests package

deploy.startCommand: if [ -f backend/target/monitoring-backend-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar ]; then java -jar backend/target/monitoring-backend-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar; else java -jar target/monitoring-backend-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar; fi
